questions.text: 😴 How many hours did you sleep last night?
💭 How's your mood? (great / good / okay / low)
🍽️ Describe what you ate yesterday — or send a food photo!
🏋️ Did you work out? If yes, briefly describe it. If no, just say 'rest day'.
👟 Roughly how many steps did you take? (check your phone if unsure)
💧 How many glasses of water? (1 glass ≈ 250ml)
